features: BONDS IN SECONDS: 151 Super Glue, clean & easy application. Sticks fine china, pottery, rubber, aluminium, jewellery and many other materials and surfaces.
SUPER STRONG GLUE: 151 Super Glue, fast dry time, super strength, clamps not required after application, dries clear. Ideal for all household assembly and repairs.
HOW TO USE: Protect work area at all times. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application. Warning: Protect skin, bonds skin and eyes in seconds.
INVISIBLE BOND: 151 Super Glue, perfect invisible adhesive bond. Repair a range of household and personal items.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, re-sealable 3g tube. Store at room temperature
description: Product Description 151 Super Glue, clean & easy application. Fast dry time, super strength, clamps not required after application, dries clear. Sticks fine china, pottery, rubber, aluminium, jewellery and many other materials and surfaces. Protect work area at all times. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application.
